response.overview: Nazneen is a proud girl who likes to play with men's hearts. Her encounter with Naim makes her feel challenged when Naim completely ignores her. Naim's rejection causes Nazneen to be determined to destroy Naim's relationship with Hidayah. Nazneen plans something to get revenge on Naim but her plan backfires and consumes her instead. Nazneen marries Naim Khair, but life with Naim Khair is not as easy as she imagined. A remorseful Nazneen begins to transform into a virtuous wife. However, all her dark secrets against her husband are revealed. No one is willing to listen to Nazneen's explanations and heartfelt regrets. Can Naim accept her again?
response.title: Dia Yang Ku Jadikan Suami
